posts.text: Advance Create is now live — @Prasad_G We sincerely appreciate your patience. Over the past few weeks, the team’s primary focus has been on launching the new Streak app. With this rollout expected to be completed tentatively within this month, the team will be able to further prioritize the remaining enhancements and feature additions, including support for Weekly and Monthly timeframes. While we are unable to share a revised ETA at the moment, please be assured that this feature continues to remain in our development pipeline and is planned for upcoming updates. We truly appreciate your conti…
